creator: mthompsn@mica.edu
text:
Figured it out, card is now running.  Boot up under DOS, run the card
diagnostic software and TURN OFF PLUG N' PLAY FEATURE.  Then reboot
under FBSD, et voila!  She works!  Thanks to all for your help.
--
